title: Build gamified micro-learning platform with interactive lessons and certifications

requirements.text: Create a lesson catalog page that displays bite-sized interactive lessons organized by skill categories (e.g., Design, Programming, Business, Creative Arts). Each lesson card should show the title, estimated completion time (5-15 minutes), difficulty level, and progress indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson catalog displays at least 3-5 skill categories
Each lesson card shows title, duration, difficulty, and progress
Users can filter lessons by category and difficulty
Clicking a lesson card navigates to the lesson detail page

requirements.text: Implement an interactive lesson player that presents content in small, digestible chunks with interactive elements such as multiple-choice questions, drag-and-drop exercises, fill-in-the-blank activities, and clickable demonstrations. Track user progress through each lesson segment.
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson player displays content in sequential segments
At least 3 types of interactive exercises are supported (multiple-choice, drag-and-drop, fill-in-blank)
Users can navigate between lesson segments
Progress is saved after completing each segment
Interactive elements are responsive and work on different screen sizes

requirements.text: Build an immediate feedback system that validates user responses to interactive exercises in real-time, showing correct/incorrect indicators, explanations for wrong answers, and encouragement messages. Display a summary at the end of each lesson segment showing accuracy and key takeaways.
acceptanceCriteria: User receives instant feedback (within 1 second) after submitting an answer
Correct answers show positive reinforcement with visual indicators
Incorrect answers display explanations and hint towards the correct solution
Lesson segment summary shows accuracy percentage and key learning points
Feedback messages are encouraging and constructive

requirements.text: Create a gamification system with experience points (XP), skill levels, achievement badges, and daily streaks. Award XP for completing lessons, maintaining learning streaks, and achieving high accuracy scores. Display user level, total XP, and badges on a profile dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Users earn XP for completing lessons and maintaining streaks
XP accumulation advances user through skill levels (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert)
At least 5 achievement badges are available (e.g., First Lesson, Week Streak, Perfect Score, Speed Learner, Category Master)
Profile dashboard displays current level, total XP, badges earned, and current streak
Visual animations celebrate level-ups and badge unlocks

requirements.text: Implement a certification system that generates verifiable digital certificates upon completing a skill track (collection of related lessons). Certificates should display the user's name, skill completed, completion date, and a unique verification ID. Store certificate data on-chain for authenticity.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view available certification tracks and their requirements
Upon completing all lessons in a track, a digital certificate is automatically generated
Certificate displays user name, skill name, completion date, and unique verification ID
Certificate can be downloaded as a PDF or shared via a unique URL
Certificate authenticity can be verified using the verification ID
Certificate data is stored on the Internet Computer blockchain

requirements.text: Design a user profile page showing learning statistics including total lessons completed, current streak, total XP, skill levels across categories, earned badges, and obtained certifications. Include visual charts for learning progress over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile displays user avatar, name, and account creation date
Statistics section shows total lessons completed, current streak, and total XP
Skill breakdown shows levels achieved in each category
Badge collection is displayed with earned and locked badges
Certifications section lists all earned certificates with view/download options
Progress chart visualizes learning activity over the past 30 days

requirements.text: Establish a modern, energetic visual design with a vibrant color palette featuring gradients and dynamic elements. Use playful illustrations and animations to make learning feel engaging and rewarding. Typography should be clean and highly readable for educational content. Implement smooth transitions between lesson segments and celebratory micro-interactions for achievements.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses vibrant, motivating colors (not defaulting to blue and purple)
Consistent use of gradients and dynamic visual elements throughout the interface
Playful illustrations enhance the learning experience without being distracting
Typography is clear, accessible, and optimized for reading educational content
Smooth transitions and animations enhance user engagement
Achievement celebrations include delightful micro-interactions and animations

constraints: Use only Motoko for backend logic within a single-actor architecture
Frontend must use React with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query
All user authentication must use Internet Identity
Certificate verification must leverage Internet Computer blockchain for data integrity
nonGoals: Video-based lessons or live streaming features
Social networking features like user messaging or forums
Integration with external learning platforms or third-party APIs

required: Hero illustration showing diverse learners engaging with digital devices and learning symbols like books, lightbulbs, and achievement badges in a vibrant, modern style (hero-learning.dim_1200x600.png)
Achievement badge icon for completing first lesson, featuring a star or trophy design with celebratory elements (badge-first-lesson.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge icon for week streak, featuring a flame or calendar with checkmarks (badge-week-streak.dim_256x256.png)
Achievement badge icon for perfect score, featuring a medal or ribbon design (badge-perfect-score.dim_256x256.png)
Illustration for empty state when no lessons are started, showing an inviting character with learning materials (empty-lessons.dim_400x400.png)
Certificate template background with elegant border design and subtle patterns suitable for professional credentials (certificate-bg.dim_1200x900.png)
